name: generate_hwh
full_help:
generate_hwh

Description: 
Generate HWH file

Syntax: 
generate_hwh  -connectivity_file <arg> -outdir <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]
              <state_file>

Returns: 
Parse the metadata files and generate the HWH file

Usage: 
  Name                Description
  -------------------------------
  -connectivity_file  Path of the connectivity file to be read
  -outdir             Path of the output directory
  [-quiet]            Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]          Suspend message limits during command execution
  <state_file>        Path of the state json file

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Path of the connectivity file to be read
Suspend message limits during command execution
